version_id.description: The unique identifier for this version of the workspace

repository_id.description: The unique identifier for the repository that this version of the workspace is associated with

base_repository_version_id.description: The unique identifier for the base version of the repository that this version of the workspace is associated with

parent_workspace_version_id.description: The unique identifier for the parent version of the workspace that this version was created from

mutation_set.description: The set of mutations that were applied to create this version of the workspace

affected_paths.description: The set of paths that were affected by the mutations that were applied to create this version of the workspace

invalidated_evidence_set.description: The set of evidence that was invalidated by the mutations that were applied to create this version of the workspace

invalidation_reference.description: The reference to the evidence that invalidated this version of the workspace

synchronized.description: Whether this version of the workspace has been synchronized with the base repository version

created_at.description: The timestamp when this version of the workspace was created
